body_txt: It seems that to properly convey that your male character is an Absent-Minded Professor or a Mad Scientist in fiction, you only need one thing: give him Einstein-esque hair. Bonus points if you go for the complete look. Additional bonus points if he uses a Van de Graaff generator or a Tesla coil instead of combing. And it actually makes sense given that: Contrast Wild Hair , which also indicates indifference to society's opinion, but otherwise has quite different connotations. Sub-Trope of Messy Hair . Compare Labcoat of Science and Medicine and Goatee of Intellect . See also Memetic Hair , which this style can be an example of.
